header.label: Profile
header.title: About Fajar
header.description: A web developer based in Bekasi, focused on building practical, responsive, and maintainable web applications while continuing to strengthen his technical foundations.

profile.label: Profile Statement
profile.title: Building practical web applications while strengthening the foundations behind them.
paragraphs: I am an Informatics Engineering graduate and web developer based in Bekasi, Indonesia. My work focuses on responsive interfaces, content-driven websites, and web applications that connect frontend systems with APIs, databases, and external services.
My projects have involved React, Next.js, TypeScript, Express.js, Prisma, MySQL, payment integration, QR-based ticketing, and static content architecture.
Fajar Works records not only finished projects, but also the decisions, experiments, technical notes, and learning process behind the work.

direction.label: Current Direction
direction.title: A practical path toward stronger engineering foundations.
direction.description: The current focus is not only producing more projects, but improving the reasoning, structure, and technical understanding behind each implementation.
focus: Strengthening JavaScript, TypeScript, React, and Next.js fundamentals.
Building responsive and maintainable content-driven web applications.
Improving API, backend, database, and third-party service integration.
Documenting technical decisions through case studies, notes, and learning logs.
approach: Define the content structure and project scope before adding unnecessary complexity.
Prioritize semantic HTML, accessibility, responsive behavior, and maintainability.
Separate content, presentation, data access, and validation responsibilities.
Refactor based on responsibility and reasons to change, not only file length.

education.label: Education
education.title: Informatics engineering, practical development, and technical research.
description: Completed a 4.5-year undergraduate program in Informatics Engineering at Universitas Muhammadiyah Purwokerto. The learning experience included web application development, system design, database integration, and technical research.

During the program, I joined the Kampus Merdeka MSIB Independent Study program at Dicoding in 2024 and later contributed to a published research article based on the Baturraden digital ticketing project.

highlights.title: MSIB Independent Study — Dicoding
highlights.description: Participated in the Kampus Merdeka MSIB Independent Study program at Dicoding for one semester.

highlights.title: QR Code and Payment Gateway Implementation for Baturraden Tourism Ticketing
highlights.description: Contributed as an author to a published article documenting the implementation and evaluation of the Baturraden digital ticketing application.

capabilities.label: Capabilities
capabilities.title: A developing technical scope built through practical projects.
capabilities.description: These capabilities represent the areas currently applied, documented, and continuously strengthened through project work and structured learning.

cv.label: Curriculum Vitae
cv.title: Professional information in two language versions.
cv.description: Download the resume version that best matches the application or professional context.
